---
description: "Draft or revise a Hugo post with consistent front matter, structure, and publishing quality checks."
name: "Draft Hugo Post"
argument-hint: "Topic, audience, tone, desired length, and target section"
agent: "agent"
---
Create a production-ready draft for a Hugo post in this repository.

Requirements:
- Follow existing front matter and content conventions from src/content/posts/.
- Produce a concise title, slug suggestion, excerpt, and body.
- Include section headers and a short conclusion.
- Suggest tags and category values that align with existing taxonomy.
- End with a short checklist of any repository-specific follow-up edits needed.
